"vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-1321", "name": "Improperly Controlled Modification of Object Prototype Attributes ('Prototype Pollution')"}], "description": "### Impact
Remotely triggerable DoS in find-my-way when it is used with Node's HTTP/2 server.

The short version is that `lookup()` passes `req.method` into `find()`, and `find()` indexes `this.trees[method]`. Since `this.trees` is a normal object, HTTP/2 method values like constructor, `toString`, or `__proto__` can resolve inherited object properties instead of returning undefined. The code then treats that value like a router node and crashes when it reaches `currentNode.prefix.length`.

### Patches

Upgrade to v9.7.0.

### Workarounds

Do not use find-my-way with HTTP/2 servers, or validate that the http method is valid beforehand.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-c96f-x56v-gq3h", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-23T19:33:15Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c96f-x56v-gq3h", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-c96f-x56v-gq3h"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47219"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-23T19:33:15Z", "references": ["https://github.com/delvedor/find-my-way/security/advisories/GHSA-c96f-x56v-gq3h", "https://github.com/delvedor/find-my-way/pull/434", "https://github.com/delvedor/find-my-way/commit/cfe3fd6168b5ac1594c0820fb83fce251a533fc1", "https://github.com/delvedor/find-my-way/releases/tag/v9.7.0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c96f-x56v-gq3h"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/delvedor/find-my-way/security-advisories/GHSA-c96f-x56v-gq3h", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/delvedor/find-my-way", "summary": "find-my-way: DDoS with HTTP2", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-23T19:33:15Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-c96f-x56v-gq3h", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "9.7.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "find-my-way"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 9.6.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: find-my-way: DDoS with HTTP2
